title: Principal Plant Manager at SAIL International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at SAIL International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SAIL International Enterprises! We are hiring a Plant Manager for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SAIL International Enterprises:
SAIL International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL International Enterprises!
